news.headline: Taproot appoints Cat Ward as new CEO, known for driving change, effective Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Taproot revealed Cat Ward as their new Chief Executive Officer. Ward, a prominent figure in fostering systemic change by uniting business and social sectors, will assume her role immediately. Ward's reputation precedes her, known for her innovative approach and visionary leadership.

news.headline: BAE Systems wins $12 million contract from DARPA to develop high-bandwidth pressure sensor for extreme temperatures.
news.summary: DARPA has granted a $12 million contract to BAE Systems' FAST Labs™ in NASHUA, N.H. The contract was awarded on December 9, 2024. DARPA, the U.S. Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency, selected the research and development organization for this funding.

news.headline: Unlock Health recognized in Modern Healthcare's Best in Business for Marketing and PR; part of inaugural class. Nashville, TN Dec.9, 2024.
news.summary: Unlock Health, a novel full-service healthcare agency, has been recognized as one of the best in Marketing and Public Relations by Modern Healthcare in their inaugural class. The prestigious title was bestowed upon the company on December 9, 2024, in Nashville, Tennessee. Unlock Health offers innovative solutions that streamline the healthcare industry, making it more efficient.

news.headline: Shipium and DoorDash partner to enhance local delivery for merchants, integrating DoorDash services on Shipium's carrier network.
news.summary: Shipium, a prominent technology platform for ecommerce shippers, revealed a new collaboration on December 9, 2024, with DoorDash Drive On-Demand. This partnership enables DoorDash's services to be promptly accessible on Shipium's pre-integrated carrier network. This move signifies a significant step for both companies in enhancing their services and accessibility to customers.

news.headline: Registrar Corp acquires PCR Group, expanding global cosmetic regulatory services. Largest compliance company in the world.
news.summary: In a recent development on December 9, 2024, Registrar Corp from Cambridge, England, has successfully acquired Personal Care Regulatory (PCR) Group from Hampton, Virginia. Registrar Corp, known as the largest cosmetics compliance company globally, finalized the acquisition of PCR Group, a renowned company specializing in cosmetic regulatory matters, toxicology, and compliance. This strategic move signifies a significant addition to Registrar Corp's portfolio, enhancing its expertise in the industry.

Crash Champions donates $200,000 to Collision Engineering at Charity Golf Outing, 11th anniversary.
news.summary: In Dana Point, California on December 9, 2024, the Crash Champions Collision Repair Team revealed their generous donation of $200,000 to Collision Engineering during the organization's Charity Golf Outing. This significant contribution served as the highlight of Crash Champions' 11th annual event.

news.headline: Boviet Solar's modules utilized in New Mexico's Escalante Project, an award-winning venture.
news.summary: Boviet Solar Technology Co. Ltd., a prominent solar energy technology company based in San Jose, California, announced their latest innovations on December 9, 2024. The company specializes in producing monocrystalline PERC and TOPCon PV cells, along with their Gamma Series™ Monofacial and Vega Series™ Bifacial PV modules. This reputable company is known for their advancements in the solar energy sector.

J.P. Morgan Asset Management hires Aaron Mulvihill as alternatives strategist to meet increased demand in thought leadership.
news.summary: Alternative investment specialist Aaron Mulvihill will be joining J.P. Morgan Asset Management in New York on December 9, 2024, as an executive director to lead the Market Insights team. This move comes as the demand for alternative investment expertise grows, with Aaron bringing his wealth of experience to address this need on a global scale. This decision reflects the firm’s commitment to providing top-notch service to clients looking for market-leading insights.

news.headline: Iprodione market expected to reach USD 503.5 Mn by 2034 with a 7.5% CAGR from 2024. Widely used fungicide for crop protection. Leading players include MedChemExpress, KANTO CHEMICAL CO., INC., and FMC Ag Australia.
news.summary: The iprodione market was worth US$ 228.2 Mn in 2023 and is projected to reach US$ 503.5 Mn by 2034 with a CAGR of 7.5% between 2024 and 2034. Iprodione is a popular dicarboximide fungicide used to protect crops from fungal diseases like botrytis and sclerotinia. Major players in the iprodione industry include MedChemExpress and Double A Vineyards. Iprodione is crucial in agriculture, protecting crops and turfgrass from fungal infections, especially in horticulture where it preserves aesthetic and commercial value. With its broad-spectrum activity and flexibility, iprodione is in high demand globally due to the increasing need for high-quality agricultural produce.

news.headline: Germfree introduces Smarthood™, a software-agnostic IV workflow solution improving safety, integrates software, hardware, peripherals.
news.summary: Smarthood™, an innovative solution, is leading the way by integrating IV workflow software, hardware, and peripherals directly into the hood in order to improve practices, enhance safety, and streamline workflows. This development was announced in Ormond Beach, Florida on December 9, 2024. Germfree, a prominent player in modular solutions, spearheaded this initiative.

news.headline: Conference Board ETI rose in Nov, marking largest monthly gain of 2024. Next release to include annual revisions.
news.summary: New York, Dec. 9, 2024 – The Employment Trends Index experienced its most significant monthly increase of 2024. It is important to note that the upcoming release will include annual revisions to standardization factors, aligning it with the latest updates in source data. The revisions will not impact...

Sotheby's International Realty opens Grand Sotheby's in Sioux Falls, SD, 1st office in state. Headquarters in Sioux Falls.
news.summary: Sotheby's International Realty recently unveiled the launch of Grand Sotheby's International Realty in Sioux Falls, South Dakota, making it the brand's inaugural affiliated office in the state. The headquarters of Grand Sotheby's International is located in Sioux Falls, signifying the brand's advancement in expanding its reach to South Dakota.

Avianca chooses Honeywell cockpit tech for new Airbus A320neo fleet to boost efficiency. - HONEYWELL (NASDAQ: HON)
news.summary: A comprehensive range of avionics and mechanical systems have been chosen to enhance operational performance and efficiency for Avianca's Airbus A320neo fleet. Honeywell revealed that the leading Colombian airline has opted for its portfolio. The announcement was made in Phoenix on December 9, 2024, and revealed that Avianca, the largest airline in Colombia, made this selection. Honeywell, identified as an entity trading on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol HON, announced this key decision.

US Wholesale Inventories MoM Rev. Actual 0.2% (Forecast 0.2%, Previous 0.2%)
MicroStrategy acquired $2.1B worth of Bitcoin, reaching over 423,000 BTC holdings at $42B value.
news.summary: In early December, MicroStrategy (NASDAQ:MSTR) purchased 21,550 Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) for around $2.1 billion. The company bought at an average price of $98,783 per Bitcoin, including fees, as per an SEC filing. To fund the purchase, MicroStrategy issued and sold 5,418,449 company shares, generating approximately $2.13 billion in net proceeds. With this acquisition, the company, under the leadership of Executive Chairman Michael Saylor, now holds a total of 423,650 BTC, valued at about $42 billion at current market rates. This purchase significantly adds to MicroStrategy's existing Bitcoin holdings.

news.headline: Dr Pepper® awards $100,000 tuition to four college students in its 16th annual Tuition Giveaway. #HigherEdSuccess.
news.summary: Four college students in Frisco, Texas, were recently selected as the winners of the 16th annual Dr Pepper Tuition Giveaway. Each of them received a generous award of $100,000 in tuition from Dr Pepper®, a part of the Keurig Dr Pepper brand family.

news.headline: Gene therapies present both benefits and challenges in healthcare due to their high upfront costs, aiming for long-term savings and improved health outcomes.
news.summary: A recent Pharmacy Forecast report presented in New Orleans on December 9, 2024, highlights the crucial role of pharmacy leaders in driving innovation. The report emphasizes that gene therapies demonstrate potential for achieving significant healthcare savings in the long run and improving health outcomes dramatically. However, the obstacle of substantial initial costs poses a challenge for widespread adoption. Pharmacy leaders are urged to navigate this issue to maximize the benefit of gene therapies.

news.headline: Fluxtrol's Robert Goldstein will present at ASM International HTS webinar on Dec 19, 2024 at 1:00 PM EST to discuss induction tube welding.
news.summary: In Detroit, Fluxtrol Inc. has revealed that Robert Goldstein, the Executive Director, will be speaking at an ASM International HTS webinar on December 19, 2024 at 1:00 PM EST. The presentation will focus on induction tube welding, a crucial technique for producing metallic tubes continuously. This process frequently integrates an internal magnetic flux controller, referred to as an impeder, to improve operational efficiency. Typically, these impeders are built for specific components.

news.headline: UK gift card market to hit $10.8 billion in 2024, growing by 7.7% annually with a forecasted CAGR of 6.0% by 2028 due to major retailers' initiatives.
news.summary: A recent report available through ResearchAndMarkets.com indicates that the gift card and incentive card market in the United Kingdom is projected to experience a 7.7% annual growth rate, reaching a total value of US$10.8 billion by 2024. The industry is anticipated to maintain this growth trend, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.0% from 2024 to 2028. This positive trajectory suggests continued expansion for the gift card market in the UK.

news.headline: CWTI partners with multiple universities and US Federal Funding to develop non-biological ammonia treatment technology, receiving $2,495,585.
news.summary: In Guelph, Ontario, a noteworthy collaboration has been established between Current Water Technologies Inc. (TSX-V: WATR) and several reputable institutions including the University of Illinois, U.S. Army Corps of Engineers, Standford University, Colorado State University, and Visage Energy. This partnership, which has received a substantial $2,495,585 grant from US Federal Funding, aims to conduct research on non-biological ammonia treatment methods. The primary objective of this endeavor is to develop processes that will significantly reduce the creation and emission of nitrous oxide (N2O), a potent greenhouse gas.

news.headline: Stocks are expected to climb despite uncertainty, according to Harvey.
Stock market expected to rise despite concerns, predicts Harvey, scaling a "wall of worry." #stocks #forecast
Silver Storm Mining discovers 3 high-grade zones up to 148m below last mined area in Mexico, containing 10 holes (1,322m).Character Count: 106
news.summary: Toronto-based Silver Storm Mining Ltd. has released results from the Phase 2 diamond drill program at its La Parrilla Silver Mine Complex in Durango, Mexico. The program included 10 holes totaling 1,322 meters and targeted the Rosarios and Footwall Zones within the Rosarios mine. Silver Storm, listed on the TSX.V as SVRS, OTC as SVRSF, and FSE as SVR, noted positive results from the drilling. An overview video of the La Parrilla Project can be viewed online.

news.headline: New developments in Pilbara region, with exploration activities yielding significant results. Stay tuned for more details.
MedaSystems appoints Brian Irwin as CEO & Board Member, with 25 years of experience in life science, SaaS, and healthcare.
news.summary: MedaSystems, a MENLO PARK-based SaaS platform, has appointed Brian Irwin as the new Chief Executive Officer and Board Member. With more than 25 years of experience in Life Science data analytics, SaaS technology, and healthcare investing, Brian's appointment comes at a crucial juncture for the company. His strong leadership background indicates a successful history in advancing growth in these industries. Irwin expressed excitement about his new role at MedaSystems.

news.headline: Ferguson (NYSE:FERG) to report $2.62 EPS on Dec 10. Previous quarter beat estimates by $0.12, leading to a 0.74% share price drop. Share price at $216.93, up 18.57% in the last 52 weeks. Analysts rate Ferguson as Outperform with a price target of $229.67 for a potential 5.87% upside. Market reactions driven by earnings performance and guidance.
news.summary: Ferguson (NYSE: FERG) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on December 10, 2024. Analysts expect an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.62. Investors are eager for the announcement, hoping for results that surpass estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. The company previously beat EPS estimates by $0.12 in the last quarter, resulting in a 0.74% share price drop the following day. Ferguson's shares were priced at $216.93 on December 6, with a 52-week increase of 18.57%. Analysts have given Ferguson an "Outperform" rating with an average one-year price target of $229.67, indicating a potential 5.87% upside. Staying informed about market sentiments and industry expectations is advised for investors.

news.headline: Stitch Fix (NASDAQ:SFIX) to report EPS of $-0.14 on 2024-12-10. Past misses led to significant share price drops. Analysts suggest tracking market sentiments and expectations. Stock trading at $4.63, up 14.32% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts rate it as Neutral with $4.04 target price.
news.summary: Stitch Fix (NASDAQ: SFIX) is set to announce its quarterly earnings report on December 10, 2024, with analysts predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.14. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations, along with positive guidance for the next quarter. The company's previous earnings saw a significant drop in share price following a missed EPS by $0.10. Looking back at past performance, Stitch Fix's stock has had fluctuating price changes based on EPS actuals versus estimates. As of December 6, shares were trading at $4.63, up 14.32% over the last 52 weeks, indicating positive returns for long-term shareholders. Analysts have given Stitch Fix a neutral rating, with an average one-year price target of $4.04. Investors are advised to consider market sentiments and expectations while evaluating the stock.

news.headline: Ollie's Bargain Outlet to report $0.57 EPS on 2024-12-10; recent history includes a 3.06% share price increase on missing EPS in last quarter. Shares at $101.54, up 39.44% over 52 weeks. Analysts stress the importance of guidance for market reaction.
news.summary: Ollie's Bargain Outlet (NASDAQ:OLLI) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on December 10, 2024, with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.57. Investors are eager for the results and optimistic about a potential beat and positive guidance for the next quarter. Past performance shows mixed results in meeting EPS estimates, with market reactions often driven by guidance. In the last quarter, missing EPS resulted in a 3.06% share price increase the next day. Ollie's Bargain Outlet shares were trading at $101.54, up 39.44% over the last 52 weeks, indicating positive returns. Market sentiments and expectations play a crucial role, with a consensus rating available on Benzinga.com for further insight.

news.headline: Dave & Buster's (NASDAQ:PLAY) to report quarterly earnings on 12/10/2024. Analysts expect EPS of -$0.28. Bulls await positive guidance.
news.summary: Dave & Buster's Enter (NASDAQ: PLAY) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, December 10, 2024. Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.28. Investors will be eager to see if the actual results surpass this estimate and if the company offers a positive outlook. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Academy Sports (NASDAQ: ASO) preps to announce quarterly earnings ($1.28 EPS) on 2024-12-10. Past misses had led to price drops. Shares currently at $50.4, down 10.72% in 52 weeks. Analyst sentiment and expectations play a crucial role for investors.
news.summary: Academy Sports (NASDAQ: ASO) is set to release its quarterly earnings on 2024-12-10, with analysts predicting an EPS of $1.28. The market is eagerly anticipating the announcement, hoping for results that surpass expectations and positive guidance for the next quarter, which can significantly impact stock prices. In the previous quarter, missing EPS by $0.00 led to a 1.21% drop in share price. Over the past quarters, Academy Sports has had varied performance, with the share price fluctuating based on meeting or missing EPS estimates. As of December 06, the stock was trading at $50.4, down 10.72% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts have provided the company with 12 ratings, suggesting the importance of understanding market sentiments and expectations for investors.
